free_text: Unusual feature of alpha spectra in the 12C+93Nb
reaction near Coulomb barrier energies
Self-supporting 93Nb foil of thickness ~0.5 mg/cm2
Protons and alpha particles were detected
using three silicon surface barrier telescope with
thickness combinations of (30 um + 2 mm, 30 um + 2 mm
and 25 um + 2 mm).
These telescopes were kept at backward angles of 116,
125 and 153, and at a distance of 6.6 cm from the
target.
No information on sources of uncertainties
V.K.Mulik
On. Finalized
GM. Data received from E.T. Mirgule.
